div.head: The Ambassador in Spain (Bowers), Then in France, to the Secretary of State

opener.dateline:
St. Jean de Luz, September 30, 1938—1 p.m.
[Received September 30—9:35 a.m.]

div.p:
536. My telegram number 534, September 28, 1 p.m.Not printed. Viscount MamblasRepresenting Franco’s Foreign Office at St. Jean de Luz. telephoned me last night that Burgos will cooperate with
Friends Committee on the Red Cross flour and is very appreciative of the offer. Letter probably will reach me in a day or so from Burgos but with Mamblas’ assurance the Red Cross may proceed as planned.
